name: dsk-monorepo
description: dsk — design-system memory toolkit for humans and AI agents

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json
